name: Allegion plc
description: Allegion plc is a leading global provider of security products and solutions for homes, businesses, and institutions. The company specializes in security around the doorway and adjacent areas, offering a wide range of products including mechanical and electronic locks, door closers, exit devices, steel doors and frames, as well as access control and workforce productivity systems. Operating under well-known brands such as Schlage, LCN, Von Duprin, and CISA, Allegion helps keep people and assets safe and secure where they live, work, and visit.
